title: 爱好
description_uz: «Odatda nima qilishni yoqtirasan?» — ikki do'stning musiqa, kino, kitob va fotografiya haqidagi suhbati. Bu dialog yoqtirgan narsa haqida so'rash, qobiliyatni aytish va birga reja tuzishni mashq qiladi. Qiziqarli mavzu va o'zing haqingda gapirish uchun foydali so'zlar. Takrorlash va ravon gapirishga o'tish uchun ideal.
description_ru: «Что ты обычно любишь делать?» — разговор двух друзей о музыке, кино, книгах и фотографии. Этот диалог отрабатывает вопросы о предпочтениях, рассказ о своих умениях и совместные планы. Увлекательная тема и полезные слова, чтобы рассказать о себе. Отлично подходит для повторения и перехода к беглой речи.
description_en: «What do you usually like to do?» — two friends chatting about music, movies, books, and photography. This dialogue practises asking about preferences, describing what you can do, and making plans together. An engaging topic with words for talking about yourself. Perfect for repeating and moving toward fluent speech.

sentences.text_original: 你平时喜欢做什么？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ píng shí xǐ huan zuò shén me?
sentences.text_translation: Odatda nima qilishni yoqtirasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Что ты обычно любишь делать?
sentences.text_translation_en: What do you usually like to do?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我的爱好很多。我喜欢听音乐、看电影。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ de ài hào hěn duō. Wǒ xǐ huan tīng yīn yuè, kàn diàn yǐng.
sentences.text_translation: Mening qiziqishlarim ko'p. Musiqa tinglashni, kino ko'rishni yoqtiraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: У меня много увлечений. Я люблю слушать музыку и смотреть фильмы.
sentences.text_translation_en: I have a lot of hobbies. I like listening to music and watching movies.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你最喜欢什么音乐？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zuì xǐ huan shén me yīn yuè?
sentences.text_translation: Qaysi musiqani eng yoqtirasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Какую музыку ты любишь больше всего?
sentences.text_translation_en: What music do you like the most?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我喜欢流行音乐，也喜欢古典音乐。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xǐ huan liú xíng yīn yuè, yě xǐ huan gǔ diǎn yīn yuè.
sentences.text_translation: Men pop musiqani, klassik musiqani ham yoqtiraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я люблю поп-музыку и классическую музыку.
sentences.text_translation_en: I like pop music, and I also like classical music.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你会弹钢琴吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ huì tán gāng qín ma?
sentences.text_translation: Pianino chala olasanmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты умеешь играть на пианино?
sentences.text_translation_en: Can you play the piano?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 会一点，但是弹得不好。
sentences.pinyin: Huì yì diǎn, dàn shì tán de bù hǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Biroz bilaman, lekin yaxshi chala olmayman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Немного умею, но играю плохо.
sentences.text_translation_en: A little, but I don't play well.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你周末经常看电影吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zhōu mò jīng cháng kàn diàn yǐng ma?
sentences.text_translation: Dam olish kunlari tez-tez kino ko'rasanmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты часто смотришь фильмы по выходным?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you often watch movies on weekends?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 不经常。我周末喜欢去图书馆看书。
sentences.pinyin: Bù jīng cháng. Wǒ zhōu mò xǐ huan qù tú shū guǎn kàn shū.
sentences.text_translation: Tez-tez emas. Dam olish kunlari kutubxonaga borib kitob o'qishni yoqtiraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не часто. По выходным я люблю ходить в библиотеку читать.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not often. On weekends I like to go to the library to read.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你看什么书？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ kàn shén me shū?
sentences.text_translation: Qanaqa kitob o'qiysan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Какие книги ты читаешь?
sentences.text_translation_en: What kind of books do you read?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我喜欢看小说和故事书。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xǐ huan kàn xiǎo shuō hé gù shi shū.
sentences.text_translation: Men roman va hikoyalar kitobini o'qishni yoqtiraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я люблю читать романы и книги с рассказами.
sentences.text_translation_en: I like reading novels and storybooks.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我也喜欢看小说！你最近看什么？
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yě xǐ huan kàn xiǎo shuō! Nǐ zuì jìn kàn shén me?
sentences.text_translation: Men ham roman o'qishni yoqtiraman! Yaqinda nima o'qiyapsan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я тоже люблю романы! Что ты читаешь в последнее время?
sentences.text_translation_en: I like novels too! What have you been reading lately?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我看了一本很有意思的书，关于旅行的。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ kàn le yì běn hěn yǒu yì si de shū, guān yú lǚ xíng de.
sentences.text_translation: Sayohat haqida juda qiziqarli bir kitob o'qidim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я прочитал очень интересную книгу о путешествиях.
sentences.text_translation_en: I read a very interesting book about travel.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 好看吗？
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo kàn ma?
sentences.text_translation: Qiziqarlimi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Интересная?
sentences.text_translation_en: Is it good?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 很好看。看完以后，我也想去旅行。
sentences.pinyin: Hěn hǎo kàn. Kàn wán yǐ hòu, wǒ yě xiǎng qù lǚ xíng.
sentences.text_translation: Juda qiziqarli. O'qib bo'lgach, men ham sayohatga bormoqchi bo'ldim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Очень интересная. Дочитав, я тоже захотел отправиться в путешествие.
sentences.text_translation_en: Very good. After reading it, I also wanted to travel.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 除了看书，你还喜欢做什么？
sentences.pinyin: Chú le kàn shū, nǐ hái xǐ huan zuò shén me?
sentences.text_translation: Kitob o'qishdan tashqari yana nima qilishni yoqtirasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Кроме чтения, что ещё ты любишь делать?
sentences.text_translation_en: Besides reading, what else do you like to do?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我还喜欢拍照。我常常去公园拍花和树。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ hái xǐ huan pāi zhào. Wǒ cháng cháng qù gōng yuán pāi huā hé shù.
sentences.text_translation: Men yana rasmga olishni yoqtiraman. Ko'pincha bog'ga borib gul va daraxtlarni suratga olaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ещё я люблю фотографировать. Я часто хожу в парк снимать цветы и деревья.
sentences.text_translation_en: I also like taking photos. I often go to the park to photograph flowers and trees.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我可以看看你拍的照片吗？
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ kě yǐ kàn kan nǐ pāi de zhào piàn ma?
sentences.text_translation: Olgan suratlaringni ko'rsam bo'ladimi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Можно посмотреть фотографии, которые ты сделал?
sentences.text_translation_en: Can I see the photos you took?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 可以。你看，这些是我上个月拍的。
sentences.pinyin: Kě yǐ. Nǐ kàn, zhè xiē shì wǒ shàng ge yuè pāi de.
sentences.text_translation: Bo'ladi. Mana qara, bularni o'tgan oy olganman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Можно. Смотри, вот эти я снял в прошлом месяце.
sentences.text_translation_en: Sure. Look, these are the ones I took last month.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 好漂亮啊！你真会拍照！
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo piào liang a! Nǐ zhēn huì pāi zhào!
sentences.text_translation: Juda chiroyli! Sen rostdan ham rasmga olishni bilasan!
sentences.text_translation_ru: Как красиво! Ты действительно умеешь фотографировать!
sentences.text_translation_en: So beautiful! You're really good at taking photos!
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 谢谢！如果你喜欢，下次我们可以一起去拍照。
sentences.pinyin: Xiè xie! Rú guǒ nǐ xǐ huan, xià cì wǒ men kě yǐ yì qǐ qù pāi zhào.
sentences.text_translation: Rahmat! Agar yoqtirsang, keyingi safar birga rasmga olishga borsak bo'ladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Спасибо! Если хочешь, в следующий раз сходим фотографировать вместе.
sentences.text_translation_en: Thanks! If you like, next time we can go take photos together.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 好主意！我也学学怎么拍照。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo zhǔ yi! Wǒ yě xué xue zěn me pāi zhào.
sentences.text_translation: Zo'r fikr! Men ham rasmga olishni o'rganaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Отличная идея! Я тоже поучусь фотографировать.
sentences.text_translation_en: Great idea! I'll learn how to take photos too.
sentences.speaker: A
